info.title: agent-toolbox.ai API
info.description: The quality layer for AI agents — deterministic, offline pre-action gates. Each tool returns a PASS/FLAG/BLOCK verdict plus a tamper-evident SHA-256 certificate.

bearerAuth.description: A Solana transaction signature or API key as a Bearer token. Omit entirely to use the free tier (10 calls per IP, no auth).

post.summary: Validate that imports/packages in LLM-generated code are real and not hallucinated.
post.description: Cost: 1 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

402.description: Free tier exhausted or insufficient credits.

post.summary: Firewall an LLM response — verify claims, detect hallucinations, and enforce output policy.
post.description: Cost: 2 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

402.description: Free tier exhausted or insufficient credits.

post.summary: Distill a conversation message array to fit within a token budget while preserving key context.
post.description: Cost: 1 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

402.description: Free tier exhausted or insufficient credits.

post.summary: Scan source code for hardcoded secrets and credentials.
post.description: Cost: 1 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

post.summary: Detect prompt injection attacks in user-supplied input.
post.description: Cost: 1 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

post.summary: Count approximate tokens for a string or chat message list before sending to an LLM.

post.summary: Scan a list of package names for known vulnerabilities via OSV.

post.summary: Guard against decimal-scaling errors by verifying raw on-chain amount against the token's authoritative decimals.

post.summary: Cross-validate an asset price against multiple sources (CoinGecko, DexScreener, Yahoo Finance) and flag stale or hallucinated prices.

post.summary: Resolve a ticker symbol or token to a confirmed on-chain identity, detecting ambiguous or imposter tokens.

post.summary: Run a rug-pull risk assessment on a token using RugCheck — checks mint/freeze authority, LP lock, and overall rug score.
post.description: Cost: 3 credit(s). Free tier: 10 calls per IP (no auth).

402.description: Free tier exhausted or insufficient credits.

post.summary: Check pool liquidity and estimate price impact (slippage) for a proposed trade size.

post.summary: Full pre-trade risk gate — runs rug, liquidity, price, and position checks in parallel and returns a composite verdict.

post.summary: Deterministic position-limit and guardian-rules gate — enforces kill switch, daily-loss cap, position size, leverage, and allowed-asset constraints.
